compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md and KNOWN-ISSUES.md to reflect new log path and handler pattern
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## What
Update CLAUDE.md and KNOWN-ISSUES.md to replace legacy log path references and document the new shared handler pattern and enforcement boundary convention.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| MODIFY | CLAUDE.md |
| MODIFY | .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md |

## Changes

### CLAUDE.md
1. Replace all occurrences of 'hook-error-log.jsonl' with 'dso-hook-errors.jsonl'
2. Update the hook error logging description to reference hook-error-handler.sh:
   - Add note: 'New hook authors: source hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh with fail-open guard and call _dso_register_hook_err_handler for automatic ERR logging'
   - Add note: 'Enforcement hooks must carry # hook-boundary: enforcement header — pre-commit check blocks accidental handler inclusion'
3. Update hooks/lib/ inventory entry if listed (add hook-error-handler.sh)

### KNOWN-ISSUES.md
1. Search for any reference to 'hook-error-log.jsonl' and update to 'dso-hook-errors.jsonl'
2. If there is an entry about the legacy log path migration, add resolution note

## Note
testing_mode: GREEN because this is doc-only. The behavioral testing standard (rule 5) says for instruction files, test the structural boundary not the content. No new behavioral test needed — existing doc structure tests cover file existence/format.

## Verification
After edit: grep -r 'hook-error-log.jsonl' CLAUDE.md .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md should return no matches.
